title: Reorganize workspace from src/ to crates/ and add beskid_abi
body:
Reorganized the Rust workspace from monolithic **`src/`** into **`crates/`** and introduced **`beskid_abi`** for stable runtime/interop boundaries.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pekan`
- **Commit:** [`c41b01e`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pekan/commit/c41b01e)
- **Subject:** Add beskid_abi crate and reorganize workspace from src/ to crates/ directory structure
- **Completed:** 2026-02-26

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.0 (Pecan prototype)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-analysis`
- **Deliverable:** `v00-analysis-foundation`

## Relation
Matched how the later **compiler** submodule scales (many `beskid_*` crates) and separated ABI concerns from analysis/codegen crates. Structure carried into v0.1 compiler foundation; prerequisite for CI workspace checks and AOT smoke tests.

source.subject: Add beskid_abi crate and reorganize workspace from src/ to crates/ directory structure
